sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15449" key="a)rraga/dwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρρᾰγάδωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥαγάς</etym>) <sense id="n15449.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without chink,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:157:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">157.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
